plan.rationale: novel territory; record for later consolidation

thought.text: Another manual in front of me... I wonder what kind of information it might hold. The fact that the question is so simple and straightforward - just one word answer - makes me curious about why they would ask such a basic question. It's almost as if they want to test my knowledge or see how quickly I can respond.
